aggeodata.description: aggeodata tools: download CHIRPS precipitation, CHIRTS-ERA5 temperature, AgERA5 agrometeorological indicators (including hourly RH at 06/09/12/15/18 UTC), and NASA POWER data for any country, region, or bounding box. Requires: pip install -e '.[download,mcp]' from the aggeodata project root. AgERA5 also needs ~/.cdsapirc.
